title: hesperis matronalis subsp. sibirica
intro: Hesperis matronalis subsp. sibirica, also known as Dame's Rocket Siberian, is a biennial flowering plant native to Eastern Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting the immune system. Hesperis matronalis subsp. sibirica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
